headline: The Portfolio That Gives You a $2,000 Raise Every Year
summary: Most investors chase the biggest yield they can find, but the portfolio that actually grows your income year after year is built on a completely different logic. Here is how dividend math quietly delivers something that usually requires a performance review.

raw.headline: The Portfolio That Gives You a $2,000 Raise Every Year
raw.summary: Most investors chase the biggest yield they can find, but the portfolio that actually grows your income year after year is built on a completely different logic. Here is how dividend math quietly delivers something that usually requires a performance review.

headline: Fat cat? Weight-loss drugs may be coming for your overweight pet
summary: Startups are testing GLP-1 treatments for overweight cats while pet-food giants are leaning into longevity products as owners spend more on animal health.
